geopolitics_summary: EU fossil fuel dependence weaponization risk; Trump Strait of Hormuz threats elevate crude volatility; COP31 Turkey-Cyprus tensions undermine climate agenda.

themes.headline: Europe's fossil fuel reliance weaponized in war, EU chiefs warn
themes.why_it_matters: Reinforces EU strategic pivot to renewables & LNG diversification; supports carbon price floor & gas infrastructure investment. Risk premium on TTF via supply security narrative.

themes.headline: Trump threatens Oman over Strait of Hormuz opening threats
themes.why_it_matters: Hormuz disruption risk elevates crude prices; indirect bullish pressure on EU power via fuel-switching if gas becomes relatively cheaper. Affects LNG arb & European demand.

themes.headline: Europe heat dome sets record May temperatures across continent
themes.why_it_matters: Record heat drives peak AC demand; increases thermal stress on generation fleet & water cooling constraints. Supports renewable generation. Day-ahead spreads compress; DA margin tightens.

themes.headline: US natural gas for power flat this summer; record 2027 expected
themes.why_it_matters: US power-gen gas demand stable now; 2027 surge could tighten global LNG supply. Indirect: supports US LNG export pricing floor, narrows EU TTF-Henry Hub spread arb window.

themes.headline: Data center server electricity demand projected to surge long-term
themes.why_it_matters: EU AI/data-center buildout mirrors US growth trajectory. Incremental power demand supports Cal+1 curve upside. Aligns with EU tech sovereignty & green capex narrative. Long-dated bull.

watchlist: EU tech sovereignty plan disclosure June 3; potential renewable capex stimulus.
Turkey COP31 host role (Cyprus exclusion risk); climate policy coordination uncertainty.
Strait of Hormuz geopolitical escalation; crude spike transmission to EU gas/power.
Data center energy disclosure rules: monitor EU regulatory clarity on power demand forecasts.
